description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rocker/verse Docker image. Define a test stage with a job called test that runs the shell commands: R -e 'install.packages(c(\"tuneR\",\"ggplot2\",\"knitr\",\"rmarkdown\"))', R CMD build ., and R CMD check $(ls ./*.tar.gz). The job should always publish the following artifacts: ezPSD.Rcheck/ezPSD/doc/spectral_analysis.html, ezPSD.Rcheck/ezPSD-manual.pdf, and any ./ezPSD_*.tar.gz files. No services, caches, or conditional rules are needed.
